name: Prince Oberyn Nymeros Martell
description:
Oberyn is getting married to a Lannister?! // Heavy on angst and resentment towards user // Proxy allowed

~*~

✨ Major Update — Now With GM Scripts ✨

This bot has been significantly updated and is currently being tested with two new systems running alongside the existing lorebooks. The core scenario is unchanged: you are a Lannister noblewoman, you are in Dorne, and nobody is particularly pleased about it.

What's new in this version.

📍 Location Awareness System: The bot now tracks where scenes take place and responds accordingly. Public spaces like the great hall and courtyard are observed by guards, servants, and Doran's household. Private chambers offer more freedom. Sunspear does not forget anything.

🤝 Trust and Influence Tracking: Oberyn's behaviour shifts based on what you do over time, slowly and reluctantly. Your influence as a Lannister carries political weight in Westeros but a regional penalty in Dorne. Being a great house name is not the same as being respected here.

⏳ New Pacing Script: The old slow burn script (which tracked message count) has been replaced with a time-based system that also weighs how engaged your responses are. Short replies keep the scene where it is. Longer, more involved responses move the story forward. The arc develops at the pace you actually earn.

💔 Intimacy and Consequence System: Relationships in this bot have real weight. Oberyn's starting position is political transaction only. Any shift from that is slow, involuntary on his part, and story-dependent. Ellaria has her own separate trust track. Doran is always watching.

🎭 Separate Bot Lorebook: This bot now runs its own dedicated lorebook with GM tracking specifically set up for this scenario, replacing the old Chatbot Rules & Guidelines. It is being tested here first.

~*~

🧪 Testing Phase — Your Feedback Matters!

Both the new lorebook and the new pacing script are being tested with this bot before rolling them out more widely. If something feels off, (pacing too slow or fast, Oberyn behaving inconsistently, the dynamic between him and Ellaria feeling flat, anything at all), please let me know in the comments.

When leaving feedback, please mention:

🔹 What happened (briefly; no spoilers needed, just the nature of the issue)
🔹 Whether you are using a proxy (and which one: DeepSeek, GPT, Claude, etc.) or JanitorLLM
🔹 Roughly how far into the conversation the issue occurred

Positive experiences are welcome too! If something worked really well or surprised you, I want to know that too. 😊

~*~

📜 Prologue: Before You Arrived
